theme_and_archetype.description: Premium, cinematic, evidence-led marketing site with deep roots in Indonesian geography. Balances the technical authority of an Apple product launch with the storytelling immersion of a National Geographic documentary.

rules: Dark forest-green dominates. Cream is used sparingly for 1 or 2 'breath' sections per page.
Leaf (#52b788) is exclusively for CTAs, links, and key numbers.
Terracotta (#bc6c25) is used sparingly for emphasis words and dividers.
Never use Leaf for body text. Use Mint or White for contrast on dark backgrounds.

headings.usage: Large, elegant, airy. Use italic for specific emphasis words.

body_ui.usage: Clean, crisp legibility for all body copy, UI elements, labels, and buttons.

eyebrows_nav.usage: Section labels, navigation items, and microcopy.

layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento-style grids for data visualization and audience-path cards; full-bleed for immersive storytelling.
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous negative space (Tailwind p-16 to p-32 for sections). Let the typography and imagery breathe.
layout_and_spacing.section_rhythm: Dark dominant. Alternate between base canvas (#0a1a10) and section alt (#0f1e16), punctuated by a single cream (#f8faf6) section to reset visual pacing.
layout_and_spacing.textures: Use low-opacity background grids on dark sections. Integrate subtle soil and leaf textures.

signature_sequence.name: The Pressing
signature_sequence.description: Opening hero entrance embodying the arc sea -> octopus -> soil. A five-armed octopus liquid-dissolves the sea into soil and presses its mark into the earth, resolving into the OKN logo.
signature_sequence.implementation: Treatment B: Layered parallax + canvas/particle morph at launch. Treatment C (Fallback/Mobile/Reduced Motion): Minimal particle resolve.

general.scroll: Smooth scrolling (e.g., Lenis) is mandatory for the cinematic feel.
general.reveal: Scale-chain staggered reveal animations for lists and cards.
general.data_viz: Animated number counters. Animated bar charts (fixed-carbon comparison, yield results).
general.nav: Sticky nav transparent over hero, transitioning to translucent-blur on scroll.

motion_and_animation.reduced_motion: Provide CSS or JS fallbacks for 'The Pressing' sequence and complex parallax for users preferring reduced motion.

buttons.primary: Leaf (#52b788) background or text with subtle hover states. Sharp or slightly rounded edges (max 4px).

nav.style: Glassmorphism on scroll (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0a1a10]/60). 1px subtle bottom border (#ffffff/10).

data_viz.style: Crisp, minimalist. Use Shadcn charts or Recharts. High contrast using Pine, Leaf, and Terracotta.
data_viz.backgrounds: Cardless or flat dark panels (#1a3c2b) with 1px borders.

cards.audience_path: Clear segmented paths (CDR buyers / investors / government). Minimalist borders, hover lift (-translate-y-1), Terracotta accent on hover.

dividers.style: Gradient divider: Leaf -> Terracotta -> transparent. Alternatively, faint biochar-octopus imprint.

footer.style: Dark, massive spacing (py-32). Closing CTA band 'Lock It With Us'. Faint octopus imprint watermark.

motifs.mascot: Stylised octopus with FIVE arms, rendered with biochar/charcoal texture pressed into dark soil.
motifs.usage: Recurring motif: loader, faint dividers, footer watermark.

media_and_assets.imagery_style: Full-bleed, cinematic, Indonesian geography focused ('Zamrud Khatulistiwa — the Emerald of the Equator'). No generic eco imagery.

image_urls.description: Bali's dense, lush jungle canopy. Deep green, cinematic lighting.
Close-up macro photography of dark, damp soil texture.
High-resolution close-up of charred wood/biochar texture. Use for octopus texture.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the FIXED color palette and typography (Cormorant Garamond + DM Sans). Do not introduce new colors or fonts.
Implement 'The Pressing' sequence using Framer Motion for scroll-driven animations and parallax.
Ensure the sticky nav has a transparent background initially, transitioning to a translucent blur when scrolling past the hero section.
Build the 6 pages: Home, The Solution, The Proof, The Opportunity, Our Story, Partner With Us.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for complex marketing layouts, and heavily customized Shadcn components for UI elements (forms, charts).
Integrate the provided image URLs. Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image services.
